evals.prompt: Plan adding OAuth2 login to our app
evals.expected_output: Epic-sized plan with story stubs, multiple phases, files affected listed

assertions.description: Plan is sized as an Epic
Plan is broken into multiple phases

evals.prompt: Plan fixing the bug where the license expiration date shows the wrong timezone
evals.expected_output: Story-sized plan, concise, end-user visible verification step

assertions.description: Plan is sized as a Story
Verification is framed around user-visible behavior, not test names
assertions.criteria: Does the Verification section describe what a user sees (e.g., 'the expiration date displays in the user's local timezone') rather than technical assertions (e.g., 'DateTime.UtcNow returns correct value')?

assertions.description: Plan is concise — uses bullets, not paragraphs
assertions.criteria: Is the plan primarily bulleted lists rather than prose paragraphs? Is it lean and scannable?

evals.prompt: Plan adding a new endpoint to return provider credential summary
evals.expected_output: Story-sized plan, files affected listed, API/user-behavior verification

assertions.description: Plan is sized as a Story
Verification is framed around API/user behavior, not test names
assertions.criteria: Does the Verification section describe what an API consumer or user observes (e.g., 'the endpoint returns a summary object with X fields') rather than internal test assertions?
